Related Entities

  • hospital PIEDMONT MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • snf White Oak Manor - Rock Hill 4-star, 136 beds
  • snf White Oak Manor - York 5-star, 109 beds
  • snf PruittHealth- Rock Hill 3-star, 132 beds
  • snf Rock Hill Post Acute Care Center 5-star, 99 beds
  • snf Magnolia Manor - Rock Hill 1-star, 106 beds
  • snf Westminster Health & Rehab Center 3-star, 11 beds
  • snf Willow Brooke Court At Park Pointe Village 5-star, 20 beds
  • snf The Lodge At Wellmore- Tega Cay 5-star, 60 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
